name: Sauteed Chicken Livers 2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan over medium heat, heat/melt olive oil and/or butter (I prefer a cast-iron pan).
2. Add the onion and cook until they begin to become transparent.
3. Add the garlic and cook for another 5 minutes.
4. Increase the heat to medium-high and add the chicken stock, herbs, and livers.
5. Cook until the livers begin to brown and are almost cooked to your taste.
6. Add the white wine and reduce it down until only about 1/2 cup remains.
7. Add the parsley. While stirring the livers, gradually add the bread crumbs a little at a time until the liquid combines with the crumbs to form a sauce.
